item.title: Testing the Range of a Desert Eagle
item.description: The Desert Eagle is legendary for its power—but how far can it really shoot? What ballistic factors determine its effective range?

media:content.media:title: Testing the Range of a Desert Eagle
media:content.media:description: The Desert Eagle is legendary for its power—but how far can it really shoot? What ballistic factors determine its effective range?

item.title: Hunting Down the Barn Rats
item.description: After rats wreak havoc on the barn, it’s time for payback. What methods will finally stop these destructive pests from causing more damage?

media:content.media:title: Hunting Down the Barn Rats
media:content.media:description: After rats wreak havoc on the barn, it’s time for payback. What methods will finally stop these destructive pests from causing more damage?

item.title: We Knew This Was a Bad Idea…
item.description: Sometimes the warning signs are clear, but the experiment goes ahead anyway. What happened when this risky plan played out in real life?

media:content.media:title: We Knew This Was a Bad Idea…
media:content.media:description: Sometimes the warning signs are clear, but the experiment goes ahead anyway. What happened when this risky plan played out in real life?

item.title: I Should’ve Stopped Them Before the Tannerite Went Off
item.description: What began as a playful experiment quickly escalated when Tannerite entered the mix. Could it all have been avoided if someone stepped in sooner?

media:content.media:title: I Should’ve Stopped Them Before the Tannerite Went Off
media:content.media:description: What began as a playful experiment quickly escalated when Tannerite entered the mix. Could it all have been avoided if someone stepped in sooner?

item.title: This Seemed Funny Until the Tannerite Went Off
item.description: What started as a lighthearted moment quickly turned serious when Tannerite entered the mix. How did this unexpected blast change everything in an instant?

media:content.media:title: This Seemed Funny Until the Tannerite Went Off
media:content.media:description: What started as a lighthearted moment quickly turned serious when Tannerite entered the mix. How did this unexpected blast change everything in an instant?

item.title: We Broke Our Potato Cannon
item.description: What started as a fun build turned into an explosive lesson in power. How did making the potato cannon too strong end up breaking it apart?

media:content.media:title: We Broke Our Potato Cannon
media:content.media:description: What started as a fun build turned into an explosive lesson in power. How did making the potato cannon too strong end up breaking it apart?

item.title: Twins’ 24‑Hour Survival Challenge in the Wild
item.description: The twins take on a 24‑hour survival challenge, totally in the wild with no shortcuts. How will they adapt and overcome nature’s toughest tests?

media:content.media:title: Twins’ 24‑Hour Survival Challenge in the Wild
media:content.media:description: The twins take on a 24‑hour survival challenge, totally in the wild with no shortcuts. How will they adapt and overcome nature’s toughest tests?

item.title: Blowing Up a Beaver Dam!
item.description: A powerful moment as a beaver dam meets its explosive end. What happens when nature’s construction collides with human intervention?

media:content.media:title: Blowing Up a Beaver Dam!
media:content.media:description: A powerful moment as a beaver dam meets its explosive end. What happens when nature’s construction collides with human intervention?
